---
title: "Sart and Stroop Analysis"
format: 
  pdf:
    code-overflow: wrap
    geometry:
      - left=2cm
      - right=2cm
      - top=2cm
      - bottom=2cm
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggdist)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(car)
library(effects)
library(afex)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(ggdist)
library(cowplot)
library(readxl)
library(car)
library(effects)
library(afex)
library(readxl)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# ============================================================================
# 1. DEFINE THE PHASES (one row per box)
# ============================================================================
phases <- data.frame(
  step    = 1:6,
  label   = c("Pre-session",
              "Baseline",
              "Pre-task block",
              "Intervention",
              "Post-task block",
              "Closing"),
  detail  = c("FFMQ + consent",
              "ECG setup, surveys",
              "SART + Stroop",
              "VR / 2D / Control",
              "SART + Stroop",
              "Surveys, debrief"),
  timing  = c("~15 min", "~10 min", "~10 min", "~10 min", "~10 min", "~5 min"),
  fill    = c("#EEEDFE", "#E1F5EE", "#FAEEDA",
              "#FAECE7", "#FAEEDA", "#F1EFE8"),
  border  = c("#534AB7", "#0F6E56", "#854F0B",
              "#993C1D", "#854F0B", "#5F5E5A"),
  text_c  = c("#26215C", "#04342C", "#412402",
              "#4A1B0C", "#412402", "#2C2C2A"),
  x       = c(1.2, 3.6, 6.0, 1.2, 3.6, 6.0),
  y       = c(4.0, 4.0, 4.0, 1.5, 1.5, 1.5)
) %>%
  mutate(
    xmin = x - 0.9,
    xmax = x + 0.9,
    ymin = y - 0.55,
    ymax = y + 0.55
  )

# ============================================================================
# 2. ARROWS BETWEEN BOXES (within rows)
# ============================================================================
arrows_within <- data.frame(
  x    = c(2.10, 4.50, 2.10, 4.50),
  xend = c(2.70, 5.10, 2.70, 5.10),
  y    = c(4.00, 4.00, 1.50, 1.50),
  yend = c(4.00, 4.00, 1.50, 1.50)
)

# ============================================================================
# 3. WRAP PATH from step 3 (right-row 1) to step 4 (left-row 2)
#    Drawn as a connected polyline: right -> down -> left
#    Then a separate small segment carries the arrowhead.
# ============================================================================
wrap_path <- data.frame(
  x = c(6.90, 7.00, 7.00, 0.40, 0.40),
  y = c(4.00, 4.00, 1.50, 1.50, 1.50),
  grp = 1
)

# Arrowhead segment: last short bit pointing into box 4
wrap_arrowhead <- data.frame(
  x = 0.30, xend = 0.30,   # tiny segment
  y = 1.50, yend = 1.50
)
# Actually we need the arrowhead pointing right INTO box 4 (which sits at x=1.2)
# So the arrow should come from the left and point right:
wrap_arrowhead <- data.frame(
  x = 0.20, xend = 0.30,
  y = 1.50, yend = 1.50
)

# ============================================================================
# 4. BUILD THE PLOT
# ============================================================================
p_procedure <- ggplot() +
  # Boxes
  geom_rect(data = phases,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
            fill = phases$fill, color = phases$border,
            linewidth = 0.5) +
  # Phase title
  geom_text(data = phases,
            aes(x = x, y = y + 0.22, label = label),
            color = phases$text_c, fontface = "bold", size = 4.2) +
  # Detail
  geom_text(data = phases,
            aes(x = x, y = y - 0.05, label = detail),
            color = phases$text_c, size = 3.4) +
  # Timing
  geom_text(data = phases,
            aes(x = x, y = y - 0.30, label = timing),
            color = phases$text_c, size = 3.1, fontface = "italic") +
  # Within-row arrows
  geom_segment(data = arrows_within,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.18, "cm"), type = "closed"),
               color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  # Wrap connector: from box 3 right edge, around, to box 4 left edge
  geom_path(data = wrap_path,
            aes(x = x, y = y, group = grp),
            color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  # Arrowhead pointing into box 4
  geom_segment(data = wrap_arrowhead,
               aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.18, "cm"), type = "closed"),
               color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.2, 7.4), ylim = c(0.5, 5.0)) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA))

print(p_procedure)

# ============================================================================
# 5. SAVE TO PNG (matches thesis figures)
# ============================================================================
ggsave("Procedure_Flowchart.png", p_procedure,
       width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```


## Load Data

```{r}
# Load data
SARTdata <- read_excel("SART_data.xlsx") %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% c(28, 48, 43, 10, 11, 31))
cat(sprintf("SART participants after exclusions: %d\n", n_distinct(SARTdata$Participant_ID)))

stroop_lmer <- read_csv("stroop_lmer_ready.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint      = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Trial_Type     = factor(Trial_Type, levels = c("Congruent", "Neutral", "Incongruent")),
    Group          = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Meditation_2D", "VR_Meditation")),
    Participant_ID = factor(Participant_ID)
  ) %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% c("ID28", "ID48", "ID43", "ID10", "ID11", "ID31"))
cat(sprintf("Stroop LMM participants after exclusions: %d\n", n_distinct(stroop_lmer$Participant_ID)))

stroop_glmm <- read_csv("stroop_cleaned_ready.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(!Participant_ID %in% c("ID28", "ID48", "ID43", "ID10", "ID11", "ID31")) %>%
  mutate(
    Is_Correct     = as.numeric(Is_Correct),
    Timepoint      = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Trial_Type     = factor(Trial_Type, levels = c("Congruent", "Neutral", "Incongruent")),
    Group          = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "Meditation_2D", "VR_Meditation")),
    Participant_ID = factor(Participant_ID)
  )
cat(sprintf("Stroop GLMM participants after exclusions: %d\n", n_distinct(stroop_glmm$Participant_ID)))
```

# SART

```{r}
#Prepare variables
SARTdata$Participant_ID <- as.factor(SARTdata$Participant_ID)
SARTdata$Group <- as.factor(SARTdata$Group)
SARTdata$Group <- relevel(SARTdata$Group, ref = "Control")
SARTdata$Timepoint <- as.factor(SARTdata$Timepoint)
SARTdata$Timepoint <- relevel(SARTdata$Timepoint, ref = "Baseline")
SARTdata$trial_type <- as.factor(SARTdata$trial_type)
SARTdata$error_type <- as.factor(SARTdata$error_type)
SARTdata$accuracy <- as.numeric(as.character(SARTdata$accuracy))
str(SARTdata)
table(SARTdata$accuracy)
```

```{r}
#Filter dataset for LMER
SARTdata_lmer <- SARTdata %>%
filter(trial_type == "Go", RT > 0, !is.na(LogRT))
table(SARTdata_lmer$trial_type)
summary(SARTdata_lmer$LogRT)
```

```{r}
#LMER model (reaction time)
lmer_model_sart <- lmer(LogRT ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                        data = SARTdata_lmer)
summary(lmer_model_sart)
```

```{r}
#GLMM model (response inhibition)
glmm_model <- glmer(accuracy ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
data = SARTdata,
family = binomial,
subset = (trial_type == "NoGo"))
summary(glmm_model)
```

```{r}
#GLMM model on omission errors (Missed on a GO trial)
SARTdata$omission <- ifelse(SARTdata$error_type == "Omission", 1, 0)
omission_model <- glmer(omission ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
data = SARTdata,
family = binomial,
subset = (trial_type == "Go"))
summary(omission_model)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================================
# 1. PASTEL COLORS
# ============================================================================
group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# ============================================================================
# 2. THEME
# ============================================================================
thesis_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    legend.title       = element_blank(),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.55, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x   = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray35", hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 12),
                                      lineheight = 1.15),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
  )

# ============================================================================
# 3. DATA PREP — use raw RT in ms, same filter as LMER (Go trials, RT > 0)
# ============================================================================
sart_participant_means <- SARTdata_lmer %>%
  group_by(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean_RT = mean(RT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Group = case_when(
      as.character(Group) == "Control" ~ "Control",
      as.character(Group) == "2D"      ~ "2D Meditation",
      as.character(Group) == "VR"      ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# 4. BRACKETS — staggered heights so Control sits above 2D
# ============================================================================
dodge_w  <- 0.8
g_offset <- c(-dodge_w/3, 0, dodge_w/3)   # Control, 2D, VR

# Find the highest bar + SE across ALL groups (so both brackets clear everything)
max_overall_top <- sart_participant_means %>%
  group_by(Group, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(top = mean(mean_RT) + sd(mean_RT)/sqrt(n()), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pull(top) %>% max()

# Two heights: 2D lower, Control higher (above 2D bracket)
y_2D       <- max_overall_top + 25    # inner bracket
y_Control  <- max_overall_top + 70    # outer bracket — sits higher
tick_len   <- 9

br_SART <- data.frame(
  x_start = c(1 + g_offset[1],  1 + g_offset[2]),  # Control, 2D
  x_end   = c(2 + g_offset[1],  2 + g_offset[2]),
  y_pos   = c(y_Control,        y_2D),
  y_tick  = c(y_Control - tick_len, y_2D - tick_len),
  label   = c("***",            "*")
)

# Auto-fit y-axis to clear the highest bracket
y_top_SART <- y_Control + 25
y_bot_SART <- 0

# ============================================================================
# 5. PLOT
# ============================================================================
p_SART <- ggplot(sart_participant_means,
                 aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean_RT, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(data = br_SART, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_SART, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_SART, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_text(data = br_SART, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = (x_start + x_end)/2, y = y_pos, label = label),
            size = 4.6, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.35) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1750, by = 250),
                   expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(y_bot_SART, y_top_SART)) +
  labs(title    = "Reaction Time",                                          # <-- was "SART Reaction Time"
       subtitle = "Control and 2D Meditation responded faster at Post;\nVR Meditation responded slower at Post",
       x = NULL, y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  thesis_theme

print(p_SART)

# ============================================================================
# 6. SAVE
# ============================================================================
ggsave("SART_RT.png", p_SART, width = 7, height = 5.5,
       dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

```{r}
# SART models — renamed to avoid collision with Stroop
sart_lmer  <- lmer(LogRT ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                   data = SARTdata_lmer)
summary(sart_lmer)

sart_glmm  <- glmer(accuracy ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                    data = SARTdata,
                    family = binomial,
                    subset = (trial_type == "NoGo"))
summary(sart_glmm)

SARTdata$omission <- ifelse(SARTdata$error_type == "Omission", 1, 0)
sart_omission <- glmer(omission ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                       data = SARTdata,
                       family = binomial,
                       subset = (trial_type == "Go"))
summary(sart_omission)
```

```{r}
emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 13925, lmerTest.limit = 13925)

# SART RT — within group changes over time
emmeans(sart_lmer, pairwise ~ Timepoint | Group)
# SART RT — group differences at each timepoint
emmeans(sart_lmer, pairwise ~ Group | Timepoint)

# SART Accuracy (NoGo) — within group changes over time
emmeans(sart_glmm, pairwise ~ Timepoint | Group, type = "response")
# SART Accuracy (NoGo) — group differences at each timepoint
emmeans(sart_glmm, pairwise ~ Group | Timepoint, type = "response")
```

# STROOP

```{r}
# Stroop LMM (reaction time) and GLMM (accuracy)
stroop_lmer_model <- lmer(LogRT ~ Trial_Type * Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                          data = stroop_lmer)
print(summary(stroop_lmer_model), correlation = FALSE)

stroop_glmm_model <- glmer(Is_Correct ~ Trial_Type * Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                           data = stroop_glmm,
                           family = binomial,
                           control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa",
                                                  optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5)))
print(summary(stroop_glmm_model), correlation = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Contrasts - Overall RT
emm_options(msg.interaction = FALSE)
emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 10027, lmerTest.limit = 10027)

emm_overall <- emmeans(stroop_lmer_model, ~ Group * Timepoint)
interaction_contrasts <- contrast(emm_overall,
                                  interaction = c("pairwise", "revpairwise"))
interaction_table <- summary(interaction_contrasts, infer = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    df = round(df, 0),
    Comparison = case_when(
      Group_pairwise == "Control - Meditation_2D"       ~ "Control vs 2D Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Control - VR_Meditation"       ~ "Control vs VR Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Meditation_2D - VR_Meditation" ~ "2D Meditation vs VR Meditation"
    ),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 4),
    SE       = round(SE, 4),
    t        = round(t.ratio, 3),
    p        = round(p.value, 4)
  ) %>%
  select(Comparison, Estimate, SE, df, t, p)
print(interaction_table, row.names = FALSE)

# Estimated means in milliseconds
emm_df_ms <- as.data.frame(emmeans(stroop_lmer_model, ~ Timepoint | Group)) %>%
  mutate(
    RT_ms    = round(exp(emmean), 1),
    RT_lower = round(exp(lower.CL), 1),
    RT_upper = round(exp(upper.CL), 1)
  ) %>%
  select(Group, Timepoint, RT_ms, RT_lower, RT_upper)
print(emm_df_ms, row.names = FALSE)

change_ms <- emm_df_ms %>%
  select(Group, Timepoint, RT_ms) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = RT_ms) %>%
  mutate(Change_ms = round(Post - Baseline, 1))
print(change_ms, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Stroop interference model
interference_scores <- stroop_lmer %>%
  filter(Trial_Type %in% c("Congruent", "Incongruent")) %>%
  group_by(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint, Trial_Type) %>%
  summarise(mean_RT = mean(RT), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trial_Type, values_from = mean_RT) %>%
  mutate(Interference = Incongruent - Congruent)

interference_model <- lmer(Interference ~ Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                           data = interference_scores)
summary(interference_model)

emm_interference <- emmeans(interference_model, ~ Group * Timepoint)
interference_contrasts <- contrast(emm_interference,
                                   interaction = c("pairwise", "revpairwise"))
interference_table <- summary(interference_contrasts, infer = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    df = round(df, 0),
    Comparison = case_when(
      Group_pairwise == "Control - Meditation_2D"       ~ "Control vs 2D Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Control - VR_Meditation"       ~ "Control vs VR Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Meditation_2D - VR_Meditation" ~ "2D Meditation vs VR Meditation"
    ),
    Estimate = round(estimate, 1),
    SE       = round(SE, 1),
    t        = round(t.ratio, 3),
    p        = round(p.value, 4)
  ) %>%
  select(Comparison, Estimate, SE, df, t, p)
print(interference_table, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# GLMM model (accuracy)
stroop_glmm_model <- glmer(Is_Correct ~ Trial_Type * Group * Timepoint + (1 | Participant_ID),
                           data = stroop_glmm,
                           family = binomial,
                           control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa",
                                                  optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5)))
print(summary(stroop_glmm_model), correlation = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Emmeans for accuracy
emm_options(pbkrtest.limit = 10469, lmerTest.limit = 10469)
emm_group_time <- emmeans(stroop_glmm_model, ~ Group * Timepoint, type = "response")
print(emm_group_time)

acc_interaction <- contrast(emm_group_time,
                            interaction = c("pairwise", "revpairwise"))
acc_table <- summary(acc_interaction, infer = TRUE) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  mutate(
    df = round(df, 0),
    Comparison = case_when(
      Group_pairwise == "Control / Meditation_2D"       ~ "Control vs 2D Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Control / VR_Meditation"       ~ "Control vs VR Meditation",
      Group_pairwise == "Meditation_2D / VR_Meditation" ~ "2D Meditation vs VR Meditation"
    ),
    Estimate = round(odds.ratio, 4),
    SE       = round(SE, 4),
    z        = round(z.ratio, 3),
    p        = round(p.value, 4)
  ) %>%
  select(Comparison, Estimate, SE, df, z, p)
print(acc_table, row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}

# ============================================================================
# 1. PASTEL COLORS
# ============================================================================
group_colors <- c("Control"       = "#B8B8BE",
                  "2D Meditation" = "#F4A4A4",
                  "VR Meditation" = "#A4C4F4")

# ============================================================================
# 2. THEME — note legend.title removed
# ============================================================================
thesis_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    legend.title       = element_blank(),                    # <-- "Group" removed
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size    = unit(0.55, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x   = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 4)),
    plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray35", hjust = 0,
                                      margin = margin(b = 12),
                                      lineheight = 1.15),    # for wrapped lines
    axis.title.y       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.5,
                                      margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 10.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.line          = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    axis.ticks         = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, color = "gray10"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = margin(15, 20, 15, 15)
  )

# ============================================================================
# 3. DATA PREP  (unchanged)
# ============================================================================
participant_means <- stroop_lmer %>%
  group_by(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(mean_RT = mean(RT), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Group = case_when(
      Group == "Control"       ~ "Control",
      Group == "Meditation_2D" ~ "2D Meditation",
      Group == "VR_Meditation" ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

participant_interference <- stroop_lmer %>%
  filter(Trial_Type %in% c("Congruent", "Incongruent")) %>%
  group_by(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint, Trial_Type) %>%
  summarise(mean_RT = mean(RT), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Trial_Type, values_from = mean_RT) %>%
  mutate(
    Interference = Incongruent - Congruent,
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Group = case_when(
      Group == "Control"       ~ "Control",
      Group == "Meditation_2D" ~ "2D Meditation",
      Group == "VR_Meditation" ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

accuracy_means <- stroop_glmm %>%
  group_by(Participant_ID, Group, Timepoint) %>%
  summarise(accuracy = mean(Is_Correct), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("Baseline", "Post")),
    Group = case_when(
      Group == "Control"       ~ "Control",
      Group == "Meditation_2D" ~ "2D Meditation",
      Group == "VR_Meditation" ~ "VR Meditation"
    ),
    Group = factor(Group, levels = c("Control", "2D Meditation", "VR Meditation"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# 4. PLOT 1 — REACTION TIME
# ============================================================================
dodge_w  <- 0.8
g_offset <- c(-dodge_w/3, 0, dodge_w/3)

post_tops <- participant_means %>%
  filter(Timepoint == "Post", Group %in% c("Control", "VR Meditation")) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(top = mean(mean_RT) + sd(mean_RT)/sqrt(n()), .groups = "drop")

bracket_y <- max(post_tops$top) + 90
tick_len  <- 35

br_RT_between <- data.frame(
  x_start = 2 + g_offset[1],
  x_end   = 2 + g_offset[3],
  y_pos   = bracket_y,
  y_tick  = bracket_y - tick_len,
  label   = "**"
)

rt_max   <- max(participant_means$mean_RT, na.rm = TRUE)
y_top_RT <- max(bracket_y * 1.10, rt_max + 80)

p_RT <- ggplot(participant_means,
               aes(x = Timepoint, y = mean_RT, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(data = br_RT_between, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_RT_between, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_start, xend = x_start, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_segment(data = br_RT_between, inherit.aes = FALSE,
               aes(x = x_end, xend = x_end, y = y_tick, yend = y_pos),
               linewidth = 0.45, color = "gray10") +
  geom_text(data = br_RT_between, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(x = (x_start + x_end)/2, y = y_pos, label = label),
            size = 5, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.35) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 2200, by = 250),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_top_RT)) +
  labs(title    = "Reaction Time",
       subtitle = "VR Meditation showed greater improvement\nfrom Baseline to Post than Control (p = .002)",
       x = NULL, y = "Reaction Time (ms)") +
  thesis_theme

# ============================================================================
# 5. PLOT 2 — INTERFERENCE
# ============================================================================
int_range <- range(participant_interference$Interference, na.rm = TRUE)
int_ylim  <- c(min(int_range[1] - 30, -50),
               max(int_range[2] + 30, 620))

p_Interference <- ggplot(participant_interference,
                         aes(x = Timepoint, y = Interference, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-200, 800, by = 100),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.05))) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = int_ylim) +
  labs(title    = "Stroop Interference Score",
       subtitle = "Interference reduced from Baseline to Post;\nno significant group differences in change",
       x = NULL,
       y = "Interference Score (ms)\nIncongruent \u2212 Congruent RT") +
  thesis_theme

# ============================================================================
# 6. PLOT 3 — ACCURACY
# ============================================================================
p_Accuracy <- ggplot(accuracy_means,
                     aes(x = Timepoint, y = accuracy * 100, fill = Group)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar",
               position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               width = 0.7, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.95) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Group),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18,
                                              dodge.width = dodge_w),
             size = 1.5, alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar",
               width = 0.18, position = position_dodge(dodge_w),
               color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(85, 100), breaks = seq(85, 100, by = 5),
                     oob = squish, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  labs(title    = "Stroop Accuracy",
       subtitle = "No significant group differences\nor changes over time",
       x = NULL, y = "Accuracy (%)") +
  thesis_theme

print(p_RT)
print(p_Interference)
print(p_Accuracy)

# ============================================================================
# 7. SAVE TO HIGH-RES PNG
# ============================================================================
ggsave("Stroop_RT.png",           p_RT,           width = 7, height = 5.5,
       dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("Stroop_Interference.png", p_Interference, width = 7, height = 5.5,
       dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("Stroop_Accuracy.png",     p_Accuracy,     width = 7, height = 5.5,
       dpi = 600, bg = "white")

```
```{r}
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)

# ============================================================================
# COMBINED FIGURE — Stroop RT + SART RT, each in its own bordered box
# with boxed A/B badges in the top-left corner
# ============================================================================

panel_border_theme <- theme(
  plot.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
  legend.position  = "none"
)

p_RT_combined <- p_RT +
  labs(title = "Stroop", subtitle = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1750, by = 250),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  panel_border_theme

p_SART_combined <- p_SART +
  labs(title = "SART", subtitle = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 800, by = 100),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  panel_border_theme

# Helper: overlay a small bordered box with a centered letter
add_corner_badge <- function(plot, letter,
                             x = 0.035, y = 0.96,
                             box_w = 0.045, box_h = 0.07) {
  ggdraw(plot) +
    # White-filled bordered box
    draw_grob(
      grid::rectGrob(
        x = x, y = y,
        width = box_w, height = box_h,
        just = c("left", "top"),
        gp = grid::gpar(fill = "white",
                        col  = "black",
                        lwd  = 0.8)
      )
    ) +
    # Letter centered inside the box
    draw_text(
      letter,
      x = x + box_w/2,
      y = y - box_h/2,
      hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5,
      size = 13, fontface = "bold"
    )
}

p_RT_badged   <- add_corner_badge(p_RT_combined,   "A",
                                  box_w = 0.055, box_h = 0.075)
p_SART_badged <- add_corner_badge(p_SART_combined, "B",
                                  box_w = 0.055, box_h = 0.075)

# Legend extracted from p_RT before its legend was stripped
legend_plot <- get_legend(
  p_RT + theme(legend.position = "top",
               legend.title    = element_blank(),
               legend.text     = element_text(size = 11),
               legend.key.size = unit(0.55, "cm"))
)

panels_row <- (p_RT_badged | p_SART_badged)

combined_RT <- wrap_plots(
  legend_plot,
  panels_row,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(0.08, 1)
)

combined_RT <- combined_RT +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Reaction Time Across Cognitive Tasks",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15,
                                            hjust = 0.5,
                                            margin = margin(b = 8)))
  )

print(combined_RT)

ggsave("Combined_RT.png", combined_RT,
       width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```


```{r}
################################################################################
# STROOP vs SART — RT COMPARISON SCRIPT
################################################################################
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

emm_options(msg.interaction = FALSE)

# Helper function to handle both t.ratio and z.ratio
format_contrast <- function(contrast_obj, has_group = TRUE) {
  df <- summary(contrast_obj, infer = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()
  
  # Detect ratio column name
  ratio_col <- if ("t.ratio" %in% names(df)) "t.ratio" else "z.ratio"
  df_col    <- if ("df" %in% names(df)) "df" else NULL
  
  df$Estimate <- round(df$estimate, 4)
  df$SE       <- round(df$SE, 4)
  df$Stat     <- round(df[[ratio_col]], 3)
  df$p        <- round(df$p.value, 4)
  if (!is.null(df_col)) df$df <- round(df[[df_col]], 0)
  
  df
}

################################################################################
# 1. WITHIN-GROUP BASELINE -> POST CHANGE
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("1. WITHIN-GROUP BASELINE -> POST CHANGE (log scale)\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
emm_stroop_wg <- emmeans(lmer_model_stroop, ~ Timepoint | Group)
within_stroop <- contrast(emm_stroop_wg, method = "revpairwise")
stroop_within <- format_contrast(within_stroop) %>%
  select(Group, contrast, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(stroop_within, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
emm_sart_wg <- emmeans(lmer_model_sart, ~ Timepoint | Group)
within_sart <- contrast(emm_sart_wg, method = "revpairwise")
sart_within <- format_contrast(within_sart) %>%
  select(Group, contrast, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(sart_within, row.names = FALSE)

################################################################################
# 2. PAIRWISE GROUP CONTRASTS ON BASELINE -> POST CHANGE
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("2. PAIRWISE GROUP CONTRASTS ON BASELINE -> POST CHANGE\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
emm_stroop_gt <- emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_stroop, ~ Group * Timepoint)
interact_stroop <- contrast(emm_stroop_gt, interaction = c("pairwise", "revpairwise"))
stroop_interact <- format_contrast(interact_stroop) %>%
  select(Group_pairwise, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(stroop_interact, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
emm_sart_gt <- emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_sart, ~ Group * Timepoint)
interact_sart <- contrast(emm_sart_gt, interaction = c("pairwise", "revpairwise"))
sart_interact <- format_contrast(interact_sart) %>%
  select(Group_pairwise, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(sart_interact, row.names = FALSE)

################################################################################
# 3. BASELINE EQUIVALENCE CHECK
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("3. BASELINE EQUIVALENCE CHECK (group comparisons at Baseline)\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
emm_stroop_base <- emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_stroop, ~ Group, at = list(Timepoint = "Baseline"))
base_stroop <- contrast(emm_stroop_base, method = "pairwise")
stroop_base <- format_contrast(base_stroop) %>%
  select(contrast, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(stroop_base, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
emm_sart_base <- emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_sart, ~ Group, at = list(Timepoint = "Baseline"))
base_sart <- contrast(emm_sart_base, method = "pairwise")
sart_base <- format_contrast(base_sart) %>%
  select(contrast, Estimate, SE, df, Stat, p)
print(sart_base, row.names = FALSE)

################################################################################
# 4. ESTIMATED MEANS IN MILLISECONDS
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("4. ESTIMATED MEANS IN MILLISECONDS\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

# Helper to back-transform: specify log base (exp for natural log, 10^ for log10)
format_emm_ms <- function(emm_obj, log_base = "natural") {
  df <- as.data.frame(emm_obj)
  lcl_col <- if ("lower.CL" %in% names(df)) "lower.CL" else "asymp.LCL"
  ucl_col <- if ("upper.CL" %in% names(df)) "upper.CL" else "asymp.UCL"
  
  back_transform <- if (log_base == "natural") exp else function(x) 10^x
  
  df$RT_ms    <- round(back_transform(df$emmean), 1)
  df$RT_lower <- round(back_transform(df[[lcl_col]]), 1)
  df$RT_upper <- round(back_transform(df[[ucl_col]]), 1)
  
  df %>% select(Group, Timepoint, RT_ms, RT_lower, RT_upper)
}

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
stroop_ms <- format_emm_ms(emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_stroop, ~ Timepoint | Group), 
                           log_base = "natural")
print(stroop_ms, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
sart_ms <- format_emm_ms(emmeans(stroop_lmer_model_sart, ~ Timepoint | Group), 
                         log_base = "log10")
print(sart_ms, row.names = FALSE)

################################################################################
# 5. CHANGE IN MILLISECONDS (Post - Baseline)
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("5. CHANGE IN MILLISECONDS (Post - Baseline)\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
stroop_change_ms <- stroop_ms %>%
  select(Group, Timepoint, RT_ms) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = RT_ms) %>%
  mutate(Change_ms = round(Post - Baseline, 1),
         Direction = ifelse(Change_ms < 0, "Faster", "Slower"))
print(stroop_change_ms, row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
sart_change_ms <- sart_ms %>%
  select(Group, Timepoint, RT_ms) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Timepoint, values_from = RT_ms) %>%
  mutate(Change_ms = round(Post - Baseline, 1),
         Direction = ifelse(Change_ms < 0, "Faster", "Slower"))
print(sart_change_ms, row.names = FALSE)

################################################################################
# 6. STANDARDIZED EFFECT SIZES (Cohen's d for within-group change)
################################################################################
cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("6. STANDARDIZED EFFECT SIZES (Cohen's d for within-group change)\n")
cat("================================================================\n")

# Helper to handle both lower.CL and asymp.LCL
format_effsize <- function(eff_obj) {
  df <- summary(eff_obj) %>% as.data.frame()
  lcl_col <- if ("lower.CL" %in% names(df)) "lower.CL" else "asymp.LCL"
  ucl_col <- if ("upper.CL" %in% names(df)) "upper.CL" else "asymp.UCL"
  
  df$Cohens_d <- round(df$effect.size, 3)
  df$SE       <- round(df$SE, 3)
  df$LCL      <- round(df[[lcl_col]], 3)
  df$UCL      <- round(df[[ucl_col]], 3)
  
  df %>% select(Group, contrast, Cohens_d, SE, LCL, UCL)
}

cat("\n----- STROOP -----\n")
stroop_d <- eff_size(emm_stroop_wg, sigma = sigma(stroop_lmer_model_stroop), 
                     edf = df.residual(stroop_lmer_model_stroop))
print(format_effsize(stroop_d), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n----- SART -----\n")
sart_d <- eff_size(emm_sart_wg, sigma = sigma(lmer_model_sart), 
                   edf = df.residual(lmer_model_sart))
print(format_effsize(sart_d), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n================================================================\n")
cat("END OF COMPARISON SCRIPT\n")
cat("================================================================\n")
```
